info.name: SAP BI Tools SAP Analytics Cloud API

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include in the response (e.g., models)

items.docs: Retrieves a list of stories available on the SAP Analytics Cloud tenant. Supports query parameters to include additional metadata such as models used in each story. Returns a JSON array of story objects with their identifiers, names, descriptions, and metadata.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Get a story by ID

params.name: storyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the story

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include in the response (e.g., models)

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific story identified by its unique story ID. Returns the story metadata, structure, and optionally the models used within it.

params.name: resourceType
params.description: Filter resources by type (e.g., STORY, MODEL, FOLDER)

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieves a list of resources from the SAP Analytics Cloud file repository. Resources include stories, models, folders, and other artifacts. Supports filtering by resource type and pagination.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

items.docs: Retrieves a list of users provisioned in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 1.1 protocol. Supports filtering by user attributes such as userName and email. Returns user records with profile information, roles, and team memberships.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

items.docs: Retrieves a list of users provisioned in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Supports filtering by user attributes such as userName, email, and custom attributes. Returns user records with profile information, roles, and team memberships.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Create a user (SCIM 2.0)

items.docs: Creates a new user in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Requires user profile attributes including userName, name, and email. Returns the created user record with its assigned ID.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Get a user by ID (SCIM 2.0)

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific user identified by their unique user ID using SCIM 2.0 protocol.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Update a user (SCIM 2.0)

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user

items.docs: Updates an existing user in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Replaces the entire user record with the provided data.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Delete a user (SCIM 2.0)

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user

items.docs: Deletes a user from SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Permanently removes the user account and associated data.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

items.docs: Retrieves a list of teams (groups) configured in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Teams are used for organizing users and managing access control to content.

info.name: SAP BI Tools Create a team (SCIM 2.0)

items.docs: Creates a new team (group) in SAP Analytics Cloud using SCIM 2.0 protocol. Teams can be assigned members and used for content sharing and access control.

info.name: SAP BI Tools List calendar events

items.docs: Retrieves a list of calendar events and tasks configured in SAP Analytics Cloud. Calendars support planning workflows, scheduling notifications, and organizing collaborative tasks.
